message:
chore(release): Bump version to 0.1.1

Release 0.1.1 includes:

Command Pattern Improvements:
- feat(onboard): Convert to subcommand pattern for consistency
  Replaces flag-based interface (--status, --sample, --gaps, --read,
  --prompt, --guided, --mark-done, --reset) with intuitive subcommands
  (cm onboard status, cm onboard sample, etc.)

- refactor(outcome): Convert required options to positional arguments
  Changes from `cm outcome --status X --rules Y` to `cm outcome X Y`
  for cleaner, more intuitive usage

Documentation & UX:
- docs(quickstart): Add solo-user workflow guidance for users who are
  both agent and operator without scheduled reflection
- docs(mark): Document HarmfulReason enum values in --help output
- Updated all README examples and CLI reference sections

Bug Fixes:
- fix(validate): Remove hardcoded emoji, respect CASS_MEMORY_NO_EMOJI
- fix(outcome): Update error messages for positional argument syntax

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
